judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly retrieved Literature & Fiction books and perfect-rated purchase_ids, but in the execute_python step it applied a brittle English-language regex and then merged on a fuzzy numeric suffix, which led to an empty join (e.g., failing to match bookid_38 with purchaseid_38) and thus returned no matches despite valid overlaps.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly retrieving 'Literature & Fiction' books and purchase_ids with AVG(rating)=5.0, the agent’s execute_python step performed an incorrect fuzzy join by matching only numeric suffixes of book_id and purchase_id (merging on id_num), which produced an empty merge ([]) and led to the wrong conclusion that no matches exist.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly identified perfect-rated purchase_ids and joined them to English 'Literature & Fiction' books, but then failed to output the titles because its final execute_python formatting step repeatedly raised a "SyntaxError: unterminated string literal" (e.g., call_Hy53XGyzu51YMXaLsSabFefv), leading it to return an error message instead of the list.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s books query (call_21AqhPkKM5z6XWeMejedADQr) constrained English-language detection to details ILIKE '%English%', so when it joined with perfect-rating purchase_ids (call_pZO5uoXA9SFdLNQDqCe4Js9n) it excluded at least one valid book (“The Sludge”) whose English-language marker was not in the details column, resulting in a missing item in the final answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
